description: Scale the AcmeCorp product API located at ~/projects/acme-storefront/ from 1 to 3 replicas using Docker Compose. Ensure the Nginx configuration properly load balances traffic across all replicas and remains resilient if a single API container fails. Verify the configuration by confirming that requests to http://localhost:8080/api/health return different hostnames. Write a summary report of the scaling and resilience test to ~/Desktop/scaling_report.txt. Login: user ga, password password123.
